title: test user login api with valid credentials
description: Verify that the POST /api/auth endpoint with action: 'login' successfully authenticates a user with valid email and password, returns a session_token cookie.

title: test user registration api with new email
description: Verify that the POST /api/auth endpoint with action: 'register' successfully registers a new user with a unique email, returns a success message.

title: test get project details api
description: Verify that the GET /api/projects/[id] endpoint returns the correct project details including title, description, members, tags, and progress metrics for an authenticated user.

title: test update project api with valid data
description: Verify that the PUT /api/projects/[id] endpoint successfully updates the project title, description, and tags when valid data is provided by an authenticated user.

title: test delete project api success
description: Verify that the DELETE /api/projects/[id] endpoint successfully deletes the project from the database.
